description: INTSIG is a Shanghai-based AI and big-data software company behind products including CamScanner, CamCard, TextIn, and Qixin. Its website presents company, product, and security information, with enterprise OCR and data offerings described at a high level.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on intsig.com itself. The site is a corporate/product website that mentions APIs and SDK-style offerings for products like TextIn, but the documented public cloud API endpoints and product sites it links to live on other domains such as textin.com/textin.ai rather than intsig.com.
